steps.action: Navigate to /demo/create-keyset and wait for networkidle
steps.expected: Create form renders with canonical content, labels, fields, helper copy, stepper, and CTA
steps.observed: All required copy rendered, including stepper labels (Create/Create Profile/Distribute Shares), title/subtitle, Keyset Name helper text, nsec section with Generate, threshold/total steppers, dynamic help line, and Create Keyset CTA

steps.action: Capture screenshot and inspect rendered text
steps.observed: Rendered text includes: 'Define the group profile for a new keyset...', 'A friendly name for this keyset's group profile. Visible to all peers in the keyset.', and 'Any 2 of 3 shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'

evidence.network: No API calls involved for this assertion; endpoint health checks returned 200 for /demo/create-keyset and static asset /src/assets/igloo-logo.png

assertions.title: Create Keyset stepper variant matches canonical labels

steps.expected: Labels are exactly 'Create', 'Create Profile', 'Distribute Shares' with step 1 active
steps.observed: Stepper labels match exactly and step 1 is active/blue while steps 2 and 3 are inactive

assertions.title: Create Keyset — Keyset Name field details

steps.action: Inspect Keyset Name field and helper text
steps.expected: Leading pencil icon and full helper text with 'Visible to all peers in the keyset.'
steps.observed: Helper text exactly matches expected copy; screenshot confirms iconized input styling and full helper line
Placeholder is 'e.g. My Signing Key, Work Key...'

assertions.title: Create Keyset — dynamic threshold/shares help line

steps.action: Inspect helper line under Threshold/Total Shares
steps.expected: Dynamic line reads 'Any {threshold} of {count} shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'
steps.observed: Line shown as 'Any 2 of 3 shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'

steps.expected: No extra static minimum explanation inline
steps.observed: Only the dynamic line appears inline beneath steppers

steps.expected: Total Shares increments and helper line updates live
steps.observed: Total Shares changed 3 -> 4 and helper line changed to 'Any 2 of 4 shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'

steps.expected: Values decrement/increment with clamping (Total Shares min 3; Threshold min 2; Threshold max Total Shares)
steps.observed: Total Shares returned to 3; Threshold changed 2 -> 3; Threshold '+' became disabled at max (3 of 3); Threshold '-' returned to 2 and became disabled at min; Total Shares '-' disabled at min 3

steps.action: Confirm no navigation while operating steppers

assertions.title: Create Keyset BackLink navigates to Welcome
Validation Error variant renders invalid-nsec content parity

steps.expected: Create layout persists with invalid nsec state visible
steps.observed: Page shows Create layout with stepper, title, fields, dynamic help, and CTA still present

steps.expected: Input populated with 'not-a-valid-key' and red helper 'Invalid nsec format. Must be a valid Nostr private key.'
steps.observed: Input value is 'not-a-valid-key' and red helper text matches exactly

assertions.title: Validation Error stepper uses canonical create labels

steps.action: Inspect stepper labels on validation-error variant
steps.observed: Stepper labels match canonical create labels; no stale labels present

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log was sparse for SPA route transitions (primarily showing static asset requests), so URL and curl status checks were used as supplemental network evidence.
frictions.resolution: Captured browser URL transitions/screenshots and verified relevant endpoints with curl (HTTP 200).
